body: Hey — can you confirm the dock slot for tomorrow?
Yeah, 2pm is fine. Send the packing list when ready.
Ship to: 88 Harbor Loop, Dockside, EX 44. Gate code 9911# (eval only).
Got it. Rider will need ID — use DL-DEV-88421-XK9Q on the manifest for verification (synthetic).
Weekly standup moved to Thu 10:00 UTC. No customer data in this message.
